channel.title: books on Krishna's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in books on Krishna's Blog

item.title: Books that I am reading
item.description: I normally read 4 or 5 books which comprises various genres. I do this keep the reading process fun and not get bored. Here are the list of books I’m reading currently. The Fellowship of The Ring by J.R.R. Tolkien The Wind-Up Bird Chronicle by Haruki Murakami Iliad by Homer, Translated by E. V. Rieu Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman Telugu vaari Vaarasatwam by Eemani Sivanaagi Reddy and Racherla Ganapathy (Telugu) Death by Sadhguru

item.title: Books Read in 2021
item.description: The Kite Runner by Khaled Hosseini Brave New World by Aldous Huxley The Hobbit by JRR Tolkien The Beekeeper of Aleppo by Chirsty Lefteri Station Eleven by Emily St. John Mandel Norse Mythology by Neil Gaiman

item.title: Books Read in 2020
item.description: This year is pretty good for me in terms of reading books, as I was able to double the amount of books I read in 2019. Raavan by Amish Tripathi Wind / Pinball 1973 by Haruki Murakami Rashomon and 17 other Stories by Akutagawa Ryunosuke A Wild Sheep Chase by Haruki Murakami Honor Among Thieves by Jeffery Archer The Book Thief by Markus Zusak The Vault of Vishnu by Ashwin Sanghi Eldest by Christopher Paolini The Metamorphosis and other Stories by Franz Kafka To Kill a Mocking Bird by Harper Lee Go Set a Watchman by Harper Lee The Tattooist of Auschwitz by Heather Morris Circe by Madeline Miller After Dark by Haruki Murakami Colorless Tsukuru Tazaki and his years of Pilgrimage by Haruku Murakami A Diary of a Mad Old Man by Tanizaki Junichiro Brisingr by Christopher Paolini Inheritance by Chirstopher Paolini

item.title: Books Read in 2019
item.description: This was the year that started it. I used read books previously too, but this year is a bit special. This year I planned on reading based on target. The Count of Monte Cristo by Alexandre Dumas Blind Willow and the Sleeping Woman by Haruki Murakami One Hundred Years of Solitude by Gabriel Garcia Marquez Kafka on the Shore by Haruki Murakami Sputnik Sweetheart by Haruki Murakami Men without Women by Haruki Murakami Third Thoughts by Steve Weinberg Norwegian Wood by Haruki Murakami Desire by Haruki Murakami
